0: Haven't seen you around before... Ahem. If you've yet to speak to Searchingway, I suggest you rectify that posthaste.

1: Welcome to the interplanetary research station, where we analyze exploration data and develop new tools for the betterment of the initiative.

2: If you would like to take part in our research, it's simple: complete stellar missions to fill up your dataset, then report back.

3: Our cosmic tools are still prototypes for now, but the more data you bring in for analysis, the more we'll be able to improve them.

4: Check your exotablet─all the details are there!

5: You may now participate in cosmic research. Progress is displayed on your exotablet under Cosmic Research.

6: For more detailed information, check the Exploration Guide.

7: Welcome to the interplanetary research station! I'd be happy to help you with data reporting, cosmic tools, or whatever else you may need.

13: Which research would you like to report?

14: I'm afraid we've finished work on that dataset. Have you considered broadening your horizons?

15: You can do better than that, surely? Go and complete more stellar missions. I can't work with anything less than a full dataset.

16: ...And before you say “that's too vague,” all the exact figures you could want are right there on your exotablet.

17: I realize it's a lot of work, but just think of what you'll gain in return: my boundless appreciation! And a cosmic tool, I suppose.

25: Not to interrupt your report, but with all the data you've gathered, we may be on the cusp of a breakthrough...

27: With your help, we've officially reached a new stage of research, and you know what that means: we're in need of all-new data! Check your exotablet for the details.

28: Your current research level has earned you a new cosmic tool. Which would you like to receive?

29: Keep in mind that this tool reflects the current stage of our research. I eagerly await your next report!

31: Ahem! You already have that one, remember?

32: If you want a cosmic tool, you'll need to bring me data, and lots of it. Your exotablet has all the relevant details.
